div.head: 393. Editorial Note
div.p: On March 13, Ambassador Beaulac and Chilean Minister for Foreign Affairs Enrique O. Barbosa Baeza signed a new Public Law 480 agreement in Santiago. The agreement, which entered into force on June 2, provided for the sale of United States agricultural commodities to Chile valued at approximately $34.6 million. For text, see 7 UST 1007.
